title: High stakes battle in Bahadurganj as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Bahadurganj. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Women voters of Bahadurganj demand better primary healthcare and clean water
